text: 如果来找我的人是_99[k]r就好了。
column6: #texten:If the one coming to find me is _99[k]r, that would be nice.

column5: #texten:...What am I saying. Not the time for this.
#texten:No. That's exactly what I want to say.

text: 把这里的发现带回西格纳鲁就够了。
column5: #texten:Just bring back what I found here to Signalru. That's enough.
